options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: permissive_yaml
options.description:
If permissive yaml is on, incompatible yaml options will be changed to more
suitable ones. If turned off, these yaml options will throw an error and
cause generation to halt.

This is intended for yamls with random values. If you're not randomizing
any options, it's recommended that you turn permissive yaml off.

options.name: starting_episode
options.description:
Select Which episode to start with. Starting with Anatomy for disaster
is not compatible with the "first section" and "whole episode" options for
"Episode 8 Keys".

choices.name: he_who_tames_the_iron_horse
choices.display_name: He Who Tames The Iron Horse

options.name: goal
options.description:
Which boss you must defeat to goal, or Clockwerk Hunt.

Clockwerk Hunt requires you to collect a certain number of Clockwerk
parts/keys to goal. All Vaults requires you to open all 8 vaults.

options.name: keys_in_pool
options.description:
How many Clockwerk parts are added to the pool. This number cannot be
lower than the required number of keys, for either Clockwerk Hunt or
Episode 8 unlock. No Clockwerk parts will be added  if Episode 8 Keys
and Clockwerk Hunt are both off.

options.name: episode_8_keys
options.description:
Whether to have Anatomy for Disaster be unlocked with a number of Clockwerk
parts, rather than with a single item like the other episodes.

- First section: Unlock only the first section of Anatomy for Disaster with
  the required amount of Clockwerk Parts.
- Last section: Unlock only the final mission of Anatomy for Disaster with
  the required amount of Clockwerk Parts.
- Whole episode: Unlock every mission in Anatomy for Disaster with the
  required amount of Clockwerk Parts.
- Off: Unlock Anatomy for Disaster with progressive episode items, like the
  other episodes.

options.name: required_keys_episode_8
options.description:
How many Clockwerk parts you need to unlock Anatomy for Disaster, if
Episode 8 Keys is turned on.

options.name: required_keys_goal
options.description: How many Clockwerk parts you need to goal, if goal objective is Clockwerk Hunt

options.name: include_tom
options.description: Add the TOM ability/gadget to the pool.

options.name: include_mega_jump
options.description: Add the Mega Jump ability/gadget to the pool.

options.name: include_time_rush
options.description: Add the Time Rush ability/gadget to the pool.

options.name: coins_minimum
options.description:
The minimum number of coins you'll receive when you get a "Coins" filler
item.

options.name: coins_maximum
options.description:
The maximum number of coins you'll receive when you get a "Coins" filler
item.

options.name: bottle_item_bundle_size
options.description:
How many bottles you receive from an item. Set to 0 to disable bottles
as items.

options.name: include_vaults
options.description: Whether to include vaults as checks.

options.name: include_pickpocketing
options.description: Whether to include pickpocketing loot from guards as checks.

options.name: thiefnet_minimum
options.description: The minimum number of coins items on ThiefNet will cost.

options.name: thiefnet_maximum
options.description: The maximum number of coins items on ThiefNet will cost.

options.name: bottle_location_bundle_size
options.description:
How many bottles you need to collect for each check. Set to 0 to disable
bottles as checks.

options.name: bottlesanity
options.description:
Each bottle is its own check, rather than counting the number of bottles
collected. Only takes effect if bottle_location_bundle_size is 1.

options.name: scout_thiefnet
options.description: Whether to scout/hint ThiefNet checks. They will still be displayed in game.

options.name: small_guard_loot_chance
options.description: The chance that any given small guard will have pick-pocketable loot.

options.name: large_guard_loot_chance
options.description: The chance that any given large guard will have pick-pocketable loot.

options.name: loot_table_distribution
options.description:
How "evenly" the loot table chances will be distributed. By default, the 6
pieces of loot a guard can carry will be distributed with the chances
(30%/30%/15%/15%/5%/5%). A lower value will make first pieces of loot even
more likely, and a higher value will flatten out the chances.

options.name: randomize_loot
options.description:
Whether to shuffle all pickpocketing loot locations. A guard could have the
same piece of loot multiple times on their table, so there is no
guaranteeing that each guard will have exactly 6 different pieces of loot.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
